detail: `viewer-ctl prepare ticket-viewer` (trunk build --release --features profile-browser) fails before browser verification with: "error getting canonical path for memory-viewers/viewer-api/viewer-api/frontend/dioxus/public/css/variables.css (os error 3)". Root cause: memory-viewers/viewer-api is an empty, non-gitlinked directory (no memory-viewers/.gitmodules); the shared trunk CSS asset links in index.html target it, while the real CSS lives at root viewer-api/viewer-api/frontend/dioxus/public/css/. `./install-tools.sh` last exited 1. This is an environment/link setup gap, not a code defect. Blocks browser verification for all frontend workstreams (W1, etc.) until repaired.
